Appearances:
Plaintiff Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kim Reeder. .
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Derick Dawson is present.
Attorney Jeffrey J. Brence representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schrieber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAR-19-2012 is vacated.(501/JPT)
